summary: Implemented Phase 1 wiring in existing app flow: strengthened Today task page with explicit daily new-word quota visibility, kept/extended vocab status filtering UI, stabilized review scheduler/day-boundary behavior by using local-date keys, and enforced daily new-word quota in learning flow (including consume-on-first-learn persistence and start guard when quota is exhausted). Also preserved existing guest daily limit behavior and verified build success.
risks: Daily quota state is currently localStorage-based; it is per-browser/device unless later synchronized to backend.
Existing historical firstLearnedAt timestamps remain unchanged, so quota tracking starts cleanly from the new quota key and may differ from prior inferred counts.
Review due-date comparisons still rely on stored ISO timestamps; mixed historical timezone formats could create edge behavior around midnight for legacy records.
suggested_tests: Today page: verify it shows daily quota, learned count, and remaining quota, and updates after each newly learned word.
Quota enforcement: set daily new-word quota to a small value (e.g., 2), learn 2 new words, then confirm starting new learning shows the quota-complete guard.
First-learn consumption: relearning previously learned words should not consume additional new-word quota.
Scheduler due behavior: mark words with nextReviewDate at today/past/future boundaries and verify due queue includes only due items.
Filter behavior: switch among all/unlearned/learning/mastered/uncertain/error and verify listed words match expected statuses.
Regression: run full learning cycle (guess→teach→spectrum→review/cloze) and ensure no flow break; build passes with npm run build.
